title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Interest Rate on Deposits) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has temporarily withdrawn interest rate restrictions on specified NRE and FCNR(B) deposits until September 30, 2026. The move gives Urban Co-operative Banks greater flexibility to attract NRI funds.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Interest Rate on Deposits) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
